_comment: TheOrc Foundry recipe TEMPLATE — smaller/next-generation theorc-boss. Follow-on #5, last in the docs' order. The CURRENT boss adapter pipeline (Gemma 4 12B QLoRA via ORC ACADEMY / train_lora.py) stays authoritative and is NOT replaced by this template.
phase: pre-F-1 (current 12B adapter is the baseline to beat)

job.name: theorc-boss-qwen25-3b-lora-v2
job.description: Plan, decompose, assign roles, and name expected files — at a fraction of the current 12B boss's footprint. Unique among templates: reviewed datasets already exist (train/eval v4gold, PLAN_CAPTURE_SCHEMA.md pipeline), so only the baseline comparison is missing.

gates.blocked_reason: Per docs/THEORC_FOUNDRY.md this is the LAST follow-on track. Baseline = the live theorc-boss:gemma4-ft adapter scored with the existing plan rubric (EVAL_RUBRIC.md); a 3B candidate must match its rubric pass-rate to justify the footprint win.

stop_rule: If the 3B candidate cannot match the 12B adapter's rubric pass-rate within the predeclared tolerance, keep the 12B adapter — smaller only wins when quality holds.
